title: Community Moderation Update
body: Today's moderation actions: 1) Banned spam_wave_42 for phishing links spam across 6 channels. 2) Banned toxic_runner for repeated targeted harassment against newcomers. 3) Warned bot_like_user_77 for suspicious automation (repeated near-identical replies). 4) Closed false positive report against core_maintainer. 5) Resolved minor formatting issue with new_member_17. Trusted members (trusted_helper, core_maintainer) were protected from sanction as per policy.
